defaultMessage: This feature allows you to automatically fetch the events added to the agendas of your choice.
Click here to find out more about aggregations
The events published by the agendas listed here are automatically added to the [{title}]({link}) agenda.
Aggregator with {count, plural, =1 {# filter} other {# filters}}
Define filters to apply for all aggregations
Modify filters to apply for all aggregations

Well done, you have aggregated {eventCount, number} events on this calendar!
The {version, select, free {free}} version allows you to create automatic aggregations up to {limit} events/year.
<support-link>Contact technical support</support-link> to increase this threshold.
Use the event Aggregation function to automatically resume events published on other OpenAgenda calendars. Combine up to 365 events per year with the free version!
